# Summary

<!-- Describe the problem/feature in 1-3 sentences -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation / ADR
- [ ] Infra / CI
- [ ] Architectural decision (paired with a new ADR)

## Checklist

- [ ] Unit tests added/updated
- [ ] Relevant integration tests passing locally
- [ ] Documentation updated (README or ARCHITECTURE.md, if applicable)
- [ ] If there was an architectural change: ADR added under `docs/adr/`
- [ ] No secrets in the diff (`appsettings.Local.json` is in `.gitignore`)
- [ ] Local build OK: `dotnet build -c Release`
- [ ] CI green
